metadata.title: Product Bricks & Capabilities
metadata.description: Hierarchical product brick map for the industrial-water-intelligence domain.

rootGroups.name: site_data_and_connectivity
rootGroups.description: The site-data and connectivity layer acquires plant signals, normalizes asset context, and turns water-system behavior into trusted operating data.

bricks.name: Sensor and Edge Telemetry
bricks.description: Collects online water-quality, flow, and equipment-state data from plant systems and edge devices.

internalModules.title: Edge Data Collection Layer
internalModules.description: Normalizes and buffers plant telemetry from controllers, probes, and gateways.

interfaces.title: Telemetry Ingestion API
interfaces.description: Ingestion interface for plant and edge telemetry.

dataDependencies.description: Acts as the primary owning brick for Sensor Stream.

bricks.name: Secure Connectivity and Device Management
bricks.description: Manages secure gateway connectivity, remote access policy, and device lifecycle across customer sites.

internalModules.title: Gateway and Certificate Control
internalModules.description: Registers, authenticates, and governs field gateways and remote data paths.

interfaces.title: Device Provisioning Workflow
interfaces.description: Workflow for onboarding gateways, sensors, and field devices.

brickDependencies.description: Provides the secure path that lets site telemetry reach the digital platform.

dataDependencies.description: Owns device and connectivity mappings by site.

bricks.name: Water Flow and Leak Intelligence
bricks.description: Calculates water balances, abnormal flow patterns, and leak signals at enterprise, site, and asset levels.

internalModules.title: Water Balance Engine
internalModules.description: Builds site and asset-level flow models and loss estimates.

interfaces.title: Leak and Flow Dashboard
interfaces.description: Visualizes abnormal consumption and leak alerts.

brickDependencies.description: Uses live telemetry to calculate the site water balance.

dataDependencies.description: Owns flow, balance, and leak-detection records.

bricks.name: Asset Registry and System Twin
bricks.description: Stores the plant loop, equipment, site, and system topology used to interpret telemetry and work context correctly.

internalModules.title: Site and Loop Model
internalModules.description: Defines sites, loops, assets, and operating boundaries.

interfaces.title: Asset and Loop API
interfaces.description: API for querying plant assets, loops, and system relationships.

dataDependencies.description: Owns the plant loop and equipment registry.

bricks.name: Lab and Field Test Integration
bricks.description: Combines lab results, handheld test data, and field observations with online telemetry for better operating decisions.

internalModules.title: Sample and Test Capture
internalModules.description: Captures lab and handheld measurements by site and loop.

interfaces.title: Lab Result Import API
interfaces.description: Accepts lab and handheld measurements and ties them to the right asset context.

brickDependencies.description: Uses the system twin to associate samples and test results with the correct equipment and loop.

dataDependencies.description: Owns lab and field chemistry readings.

bricks.name: Historian and Data Quality Reconciliation
bricks.description: Reconciles historian, SCADA, and digital-platform data so plant operating views stay trusted despite timestamp drift, gaps, or source mismatch.

internalModules.title: Historian Sync and Reconciliation Layer
internalModules.description: Matches platform telemetry with historian and control-system records.

interfaces.title: Data Quality Reconciliation API
interfaces.description: API for checking signal quality, backfilling gaps, and reconciling timestamps.

brickDependencies.description: Uses live telemetry as the digital comparison baseline.

rootGroups.name: treatment_automation_and_optimization
rootGroups.description: The treatment-automation and optimization layer turns plant signals into chemistry, control, and program-performance decisions.

bricks.name: Treatment Chemistry Recommendation Engine
bricks.description: Generates operating recommendations and treatment-risk insights from telemetry, lab results, and program standards.

internalModules.title: Recommendation Rules and Models
internalModules.description: Produces chemistry, control, and operating recommendations by loop type.

interfaces.title: Recommendation API
interfaces.description: API for retrieving site-specific operating recommendations and risk scores.

brickDependencies.description: Uses live operating data to create recommendations.
Uses field and lab context to improve recommendation quality.

dataDependencies.description: Owns digital treatment program definitions and recommendation logic.

bricks.name: Automated Dosing and Feed Control
bricks.description: Executes or assists chemistry feed and dosing adjustments through connected control workflows.

internalModules.title: Control Command Layer
internalModules.description: Issues, confirms, and tracks dosing and control commands.

interfaces.title: Control Action Workflow
interfaces.description: Workflow for automated or guided dosing and feed changes.

brickDependencies.description: Uses treatment recommendations to generate actionable control changes.

dataDependencies.description: Owns dosing and feed control actions.

bricks.name: Digital Treatment Program Templates
bricks.description: Defines reusable treatment-program templates, operating envelopes, and rollout defaults by loop type, industry, and risk profile.

internalModules.title: Program Template Library
internalModules.description: Stores reusable water-program templates and operating defaults.

interfaces.title: Program Template API
interfaces.description: API for selecting and applying standard program templates.

bricks.name: Corrosion Fouling and Biofilm Risk Model
bricks.description: Models the leading indicators of corrosion, scale, fouling, and microbiological stress across industrial water systems.

internalModules.title: Asset Risk Model
internalModules.description: Scores the likelihood and severity of corrosion, fouling, and biological stress.

interfaces.title: Asset Risk API
interfaces.description: API for retrieving current and projected water-system risk by asset and loop.

brickDependencies.description: Uses live operating data to model asset risk.
Uses lab and sample context to sharpen risk scores.

bricks.name: Water and Energy Efficiency Optimizer
bricks.description: Optimizes the tradeoff between water savings, heat-transfer performance, steam efficiency, and total operating cost.

internalModules.title: Efficiency Tradeoff Engine
internalModules.description: Calculates the operating point that balances water, energy, and chemistry use.

interfaces.title: Efficiency Optimization API
interfaces.description: API for retrieving water-energy optimization recommendations.

brickDependencies.description: Uses treatment recommendations as one input to total efficiency optimization.
Uses water-balance data to understand efficiency impact.

bricks.name: Alerting and Incident Orchestration
bricks.description: Prioritizes plant water issues, routes alerts, and preserves incident lifecycle and response status.

internalModules.title: Alert Policy Layer
internalModules.description: Defines severity, escalation, and route-to-role rules.

interfaces.title: Incident Event Stream
interfaces.description: Events for alarms, escalations, acknowledgements, and closures.

brickDependencies.description: Uses risk and recommendation context to prioritize alarms.

bricks.name: Cooling Water Optimization
bricks.description: Applies connected monitoring, chemistry, and control logic to cooling towers, chillers, and heat-rejection loops.

internalModules.title: Cooling Performance Model
internalModules.description: Balances water, chemistry, and asset-protection targets for cooling systems.

interfaces.title: Cooling Loop Dashboard
interfaces.description: Operating view for cooling performance and risk.

brickDependencies.description: Uses standard cooling-program templates and guardrails.
Uses the chemistry engine to drive cooling-specific recommendations.
Uses corrosion, fouling, and biofilm risk signals in cooling optimization.
Uses dosing control to hold cooling targets.
Uses water-energy optimization to select better cooling operating points.

bricks.name: Boiler Water Optimization
bricks.description: Optimizes boiler-water chemistry, blowdown discipline, and steam-side reliability through connected operating control.

internalModules.title: Boiler Reliability Model
internalModules.description: Tracks boiler health, chemistry, and steam-efficiency tradeoffs.

interfaces.title: Boiler Performance Dashboard
interfaces.description: Operating view for boiler-water stability and steam-support reliability.

brickDependencies.description: Uses standard boiler-program templates and guardrails.
Uses the chemistry engine to drive boiler-specific guidance.
Uses scale and corrosion risk in boiler optimization.
Uses dosing control to hold boiler targets.
Uses steam and blowdown efficiency insights in boiler operating choices.

bricks.name: Process Water and Pretreatment Control
bricks.description: Manages connected performance and treatment control for pretreatment, filtration, and process-water quality loops.

internalModules.title: Pretreatment Program Model
internalModules.description: Defines operating and water-quality targets for pretreatment and process loops.

interfaces.title: Pretreatment Operations Workspace
interfaces.description: Workspace for process-water and pretreatment performance management.

brickDependencies.description: Uses standard pretreatment and process-water program defaults.
Uses the chemistry engine for pretreatment and process-water optimization.
Uses historian reconciliation to stabilize process-water interpretations.

bricks.name: Effluent Treatment Optimization
bricks.description: Provides wastewater-treatment performance monitoring, process-risk detection, and issue guidance for discharge control.

internalModules.title: Effluent Process Risk Model
internalModules.description: Estimates treatment stress and compliance risk from live process signals.

interfaces.title: Wastewater Control Dashboard
interfaces.description: Operational view of wastewater performance and discharge risk.

brickDependencies.description: Uses standard wastewater operating templates and thresholds.
Uses live wastewater process signals.
Uses sample and lab context to interpret wastewater risk.

dataDependencies.description: Writes wastewater operating evidence and compliance context.

bricks.name: Water Reuse and Circularity Control
bricks.description: Tracks treated-water quality, reuse readiness, and circular-water operating rules for approved reuse flows.

internalModules.title: Reuse Readiness Model
internalModules.description: Scores treated-water streams for candidate reuse paths.

interfaces.title: Reuse Opportunity Dashboard
interfaces.description: View of reuse readiness, quality checks, and recovered-water value.

brickDependencies.description: Builds on stable wastewater control and quality evidence.
Uses freshwater demand and treated-water availability to find reuse opportunities.
Uses water-energy tradeoff insights when prioritizing reuse paths.

rootGroups.name: enterprise_workflows_and_value_management
rootGroups.description: The enterprise-workflow layer turns site operations into fleet visibility, service coordination, compliance evidence, and expansion value.

bricks.name: Water Analytics and Benchmarking
bricks.description: Provides enterprise, site, and asset-level benchmark views for water, uptime, chemistry, and response performance.

internalModules.title: Benchmarking Model
internalModules.description: Normalizes performance across sites, loops, and customer portfolios.

interfaces.title: Enterprise Water Dashboard
interfaces.description: Dashboard for benchmarking sites and identifying outliers.

brickDependencies.description: Uses water-balance outcomes in benchmarking.
Uses alarm and response data for operating comparisons.
Uses reconciled plant history to improve benchmark trust.

bricks.name: Verified Savings and Project ROI Tracker
bricks.description: Tracks value projects, baselines, assumptions, and verified customer outcomes for expansion and renewal decisions.

internalModules.title: Value Baseline and Proof Model
internalModules.description: Stores and validates project baselines, assumptions, and verified outcomes.

interfaces.title: Value Review Workspace
interfaces.description: Workspace for project ROI, savings proof, and customer-value reviews.

brickDependencies.description: Uses site and enterprise performance data to verify project value.

dataDependencies.description: Owns value projects and verified savings records.

bricks.name: Compliance Evidence and Reporting
bricks.description: Builds the audit-ready evidence pack for wastewater, treatment, alarms, and corrective action histories.

internalModules.title: Compliance Record Builder
internalModules.description: Packages operating evidence, samples, and action history for reporting and inspection.

interfaces.title: Compliance Reporting API
interfaces.description: API and export surface for compliance reporting and evidence retrieval.

brickDependencies.description: Uses wastewater performance and issue records.
Uses corrective action and service closure data.

bricks.name: Sampling Schedule and Chain of Custody
bricks.description: Plans, tracks, and documents sampling schedules, collection events, and custody records for wastewater and treated-water workflows.

internalModules.title: Sampling Calendar and Custody Tracker
internalModules.description: Manages sample schedules, collection events, and custody handoffs.

interfaces.title: Sampling Workflow
interfaces.description: Workflow for scheduling, collecting, and confirming samples.

brickDependencies.description: Uses sample results and collection context.

bricks.name: Permit Calendar and Obligation Tracking
bricks.description: Tracks permit thresholds, recurring obligations, reporting deadlines, and site-specific compliance calendars.

internalModules.title: Permit Obligation Registry
internalModules.description: Stores permit clauses, reporting duties, and deadline logic by site.

interfaces.title: Permit Obligation API
interfaces.description: API for retrieving permit and reporting obligations by site.

brickDependencies.description: Uses compliance evidence to satisfy reporting and obligation workflows.

bricks.name: Expert Recommendation and Case Workbench
bricks.description: Coordinates remote expert cases, recommendations, action notes, and customer-facing issue workflows.

internalModules.title: Case Collaboration Layer
internalModules.description: Supports expert issue review, recommendation authoring, and shared issue context.

interfaces.title: Case Workspace
interfaces.description: Shared workspace for issue review, recommendation tracking, and collaboration.

brickDependencies.description: Turns important alarms into coordinated issue workflows.
Uses site and asset context to keep the case grounded in the right operating system.

dataDependencies.description: Owns expert case and recommendation records.

bricks.name: Field Service Work Management
bricks.description: Plans, assigns, tracks, and closes field work and on-site intervention related to treatment, monitoring, and corrective action.

internalModules.title: Visit and Work Order Scheduler
internalModules.description: Creates and manages service work orders and field execution plans.

interfaces.title: Work Order Workflow
interfaces.description: Workflow for field work planning, execution, and closure.

brickDependencies.description: Turns case recommendations into accountable work.

bricks.name: Customer Notification and Escalation Hub
bricks.description: Manages outbound notifications, escalation messages, and audience-specific communication around alerts, visits, and compliance events.

internalModules.title: Notification Policy Layer
internalModules.description: Determines who gets notified, when, and through which channel.

interfaces.title: Notification Delivery API
interfaces.description: API for sending alert, visit, and reporting notifications.

brickDependencies.description: Uses alarm and incident events to trigger communications.
Uses work-order state to notify customers about visit status and closure.

bricks.name: Plant and Enterprise Integration Hub
bricks.description: Connects the water platform to plant historians, CMMS, ERP, sustainability reporting, and customer enterprise systems.

internalModules.title: Enterprise Connector Framework
internalModules.description: Standard connector framework for inbound and outbound enterprise integrations.

interfaces.title: Integration Connector API
interfaces.description: API for enterprise integration setup and data exchange.

dataDependencies.description: Maintains integration configuration and endpoint mappings.

bricks.name: Customer Operations Portal
bricks.description: Provides the shared customer-facing operating surface for enterprise, plant, compliance, and value views.

internalModules.title: Customer Experience Layer
internalModules.description: Presents dashboards, reports, cases, and value reviews to customer users.

interfaces.title: Portal UI
interfaces.description: Browser experience for customer operations, value, and compliance workflows.

brickDependencies.description: Uses analytics and benchmarking to populate operating views.
Uses case context to expose current issues and recommendations.
Uses verified value records in executive and account reviews.

dataDependencies.description: Owns the customer site profile surfaced in the portal.

bricks.name: Mobile Operator and Service App
bricks.description: Provides the mobile surface for on-site operators and field specialists to review alarms, record actions, and confirm work completion.

internalModules.title: Mobile Response Layer
internalModules.description: Delivers on-site alarm review, work capture, and action confirmation workflows.

interfaces.title: Mobile App
interfaces.description: Mobile interface for operators and service specialists.

brickDependencies.description: Uses alarms and issue status in the field workflow.
Uses work-order context for field execution.

bricks.name: Operating Knowledge and Playbook Library
bricks.description: Stores operating playbooks, issue-response guidance, and reusable expert knowledge by loop type and risk pattern.

internalModules.title: Playbook and Pattern Library
internalModules.description: Stores reusable response playbooks and operating guidance.

interfaces.title: Playbook Search and Retrieval API
interfaces.description: API for retrieving the right operating playbook in workflow context.

brickDependencies.description: Uses resolved case history to improve playbooks over time.

bricks.name: Enterprise Rollout and Opportunity Planning
bricks.description: Plans the next wave of sites, modules, and value opportunities across enterprise water accounts.

internalModules.title: Rollout Wave Planner
internalModules.description: Builds the prioritized expansion and rollout plan by account and site.

interfaces.title: Rollout Planning Workspace
interfaces.description: Workspace for expansion planning, site readiness, and opportunity tracking.

brickDependencies.description: Uses verified value records to prioritize the next wave.
Uses benchmark and outlier data to identify rollout opportunities.
